trend_directory
===============

Stores information with fixed interval and format, like periodic measurements.

Tables
------

.. _trend_directory.materialization_trend_store_link:

materialization_trend_store_link
````````````````````````````````

Stores the dependencies between a materialization and its source table trend
stores. Multiple levels of views and functions may exist between a
materialization and its source table trend stores. These intermediate views and
functions are not registered here, but only the table trend stores containing
the actual source data used in the views and/or functions.

+--------------------+--------+---------------+
| Name               | Type   |   Description |
+====================+========+===============+
| materialization_id | int4   |               |
+--------------------+--------+---------------+
| trend_store_id     | int4   |               |
+--------------------+--------+---------------+


.. _trend_directory.table_trend_store:

table_trend_store
`````````````````



+------------------+----------+---------------+
| Name             | Type     |   Description |
+==================+==========+===============+
| name             | name     |               |
+------------------+----------+---------------+
| entity_type_id   | int4     |               |
+------------------+----------+---------------+
| data_source_id   | int4     |               |
+------------------+----------+---------------+
| granularity      | interval |               |
+------------------+----------+---------------+
| partition_size   | int4     |               |
+------------------+----------+---------------+
| id               | int4     |               |
+------------------+----------+---------------+
| retention_period | interval |               |
+------------------+----------+---------------+


.. _trend_directory.trend:

trend
`````



+----------------+--------+---------------+
| Name           | Type   |   Description |
+================+========+===============+
| trend_store_id | int4   |               |
+----------------+--------+---------------+
| name           | name   |               |
+----------------+--------+---------------+
| data_type      | text   |               |
+----------------+--------+---------------+
| description    | text   |               |
+----------------+--------+---------------+
| id             | int4   |               |
+----------------+--------+---------------+


.. _trend_directory.view_trend:

view_trend
``````````



+----------------+--------+---------------+
| Name           | Type   |   Description |
+================+========+===============+
| trend_store_id | int4   |               |
+----------------+--------+---------------+
| name           | name   |               |
+----------------+--------+---------------+
| data_type      | text   |               |
+----------------+--------+---------------+
| description    | text   |               |
+----------------+--------+---------------+
| id             | int4   |               |
+----------------+--------+---------------+


.. _trend_directory.partition:

partition
`````````



+----------------------+--------+---------------+
| Name                 | Type   |   Description |
+======================+========+===============+
| table_trend_store_id | int4   |               |
+----------------------+--------+---------------+
| index                | int4   |               |
+----------------------+--------+---------------+


.. _trend_directory.trend_tag_link:

trend_tag_link
``````````````



+----------+--------+---------------+
| Name     | Type   |   Description |
+==========+========+===============+
| trend_id | int4   |               |
+----------+--------+---------------+
| tag_id   | int4   |               |
+----------+--------+---------------+


.. _trend_directory.modified:

modified
````````



+----------------------+-------------+---------------+
| Name                 | Type        |   Description |
+======================+=============+===============+
| table_trend_store_id | int4        |               |
+----------------------+-------------+---------------+
| timestamp            | timestamptz |               |
+----------------------+-------------+---------------+
| start                | timestamptz |               |
+----------------------+-------------+---------------+
| end                  | timestamptz |               |
+----------------------+-------------+---------------+


.. _trend_directory.materialization:

materialization
```````````````

Indicates if jobs should be created for this materialization (manual execution is always possible)

+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Name                | Type     | Description                                                                                             |
+=====================+==========+=========================================================================================================+
| dst_trend_store_id  | int4     | The ID of the destination table_trend_store                                                             |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| processing_delay    | interval | The time after the destination timestamp before this materialization can be executed                    |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| stability_delay     | interval | The time to wait after the most recent modified timestamp before the source data is considered 'stable' |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| reprocessing_period | interval | The maximum time after the destination timestamp that the materialization is allowed to be executed     |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| id                  | int4     | The unique identifier of this materialization                                                           |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| enabled             | bool     | Indicates if jobs should be created for this materialization (manual execution is always possible)      |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| cost                | int4     |                                                                                                         |
+---------------------+----------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+


.. _trend_directory.view_materialization:

view_materialization
````````````````````

A table_materialization is a materialization that uses the data from the function
registered in the src_function column to populate the target trend store.

+---------------------+----------+---------------+
| Name                | Type     |   Description |
+=====================+==========+===============+
| dst_trend_store_id  | int4     |               |
+---------------------+----------+---------------+
| processing_delay    | interval |               |
+---------------------+----------+---------------+
| stability_delay     | interval |               |
+---------------------+----------+---------------+
| reprocessing_period | interval |               |
+---------------------+----------+---------------+
| src_view            | regclass |               |
+---------------------+----------+---------------+
| id                  | int4     |               |
+---------------------+----------+---------------+
| enabled             | bool     |               |
+---------------------+----------+---------------+
| cost                | int4     |               |
+---------------------+----------+---------------+


.. _trend_directory.function_materialization:

function_materialization
````````````````````````



+---------------------+--------------+---------------+
| Name                | Type         |   Description |
+=====================+==============+===============+
| dst_trend_store_id  | int4         |               |
+---------------------+--------------+---------------+
| processing_delay    | interval     |               |
+---------------------+--------------+---------------+
| stability_delay     | interval     |               |
+---------------------+--------------+---------------+
| reprocessing_period | interval     |               |
+---------------------+--------------+---------------+
| src_function        | regprocedure |               |
+---------------------+--------------+---------------+
| id                  | int4         |               |
+---------------------+--------------+---------------+
| enabled             | bool         |               |
+---------------------+--------------+---------------+
| cost                | int4         |               |
+---------------------+--------------+---------------+


.. _trend_directory.state:

state
`````

ID of the most recent job for this materialization

+--------------------+------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Name               | Type                   | Description                                                                                     |
+====================+========================+=================================================================================================+
| materialization_id | int4                   | The ID of the materialization type                                                              |
+--------------------+------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| timestamp          | timestamptz            | The timestamp of the materialized (materialization result) data                                 |
+--------------------+------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| max_modified       | timestamptz            | The greatest modified timestamp of all materialization sources                                  |
+--------------------+------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| source_states      | _source_fragment_state | Array of trend_store_id/timestamp/modified combinations for all source data fragments           |
+--------------------+------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| processed_states   | _source_fragment_state | Array containing a snapshot of the source_states at the time of the most recent materialization |
+--------------------+------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| job_id             | int4                   | ID of the most recent job for this materialization                                              |
+--------------------+------------------------+-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+


.. _trend_directory.materialization_tag_link:

materialization_tag_link
````````````````````````

Links tags to materializations. Examples of tags to link to a materialization
might be: online, offline, aggregation, kpi, etc.

+--------------------+--------+---------------+
| Name               | Type   |   Description |
+====================+========+===============+
| materialization_id | int4   |               |
+--------------------+--------+---------------+
| tag_id             | int4   |               |
+--------------------+--------+---------------+


.. _trend_directory.group_priority:

group_priority
``````````````



+-----------+--------+---------------+
| Name      | Type   |   Description |
+===========+========+===============+
| tag_id    | int4   |               |
+-----------+--------+---------------+
| resources | int4   |               |
+-----------+--------+---------------+

| data_type      | text   |               |

| description    | text   |               |

| id             | int4   |               |
+----------------+--------+---------------+

.. _trend_directory.mark_modified(integer, timestamp with time zone, timestamp with time zone):

mark_modified(integer, timestamp with time zone, timestamp with time zone) -> trend_directory.modified
``````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````


.. _trend_directory.populate_modified(trend_directory.partition):

populate_modified(trend_directory.partition) -> SETOF trend_directory.modified
``````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````
Populate trend_directory.modified table with modified records from one
partition. This function should only be used in recovery scenarios where the
trend_directory.modified table has become corrupt or records are missing for
some reason.

.. _trend_directory.populate_modified(trend_directory.table_trend_store):

populate_modified(trend_directory.table_trend_store) -> SETOF trend_directory.modified
``````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````
Populate trend_directory.modified table with modified records from a whole
trend store. This function should only be used in recovery scenarios where the
trend_directory.modified table has become corrupt or records are missing for
some reason.

.. _trend_directory.available_timestamps(trend_directory.partition):

available_timestamps(trend_directory.partition) -> SETOF timestamp with time zone
`````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````

```````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````


.. _trend_directory.show_trends(integer):

show_trends(integer) -> SETOF trend_directory.trend_descr
`````````````````````````````````````````````````````````

.. _trend_directory.tag(text, integer):

tag(text, integer) -> trend_directory.materialization_tag_link
``````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````
Add tag with name tag_name to materialization with id materialization_id.
The tag must already exist.

.. _trend_directory.tag(text, trend_directory.materialization):

tag(text, trend_directory.materialization) -> trend_directory.materialization
`````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````
Add tag with name tag_name to materialization. The tag must already exist.

.. _trend_directory.untag(trend_directory.materialization):

untag(trend_directory.materialization) -> trend_directory.materialization
`````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````
Remove all tags from the materialization

.. _trend_directory.reset(integer):

reset(integer) -> SETOF trend_directory.state
`````````````````````````````````````````````


.. _trend_directory.reset_hard(trend_directory.materialization):

reset_hard(trend_directory.materialization) -> void
```````````````````````````````````````````````````
Remove data (partitions) resulting from this materialization and the
corresponding state records, so materialization for all timestamps can be done
again

.. _trend_directory.reset(trend_directory.materialization, timestamp with time zone):

```````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````````


.. _trend_directory.table_columns(oid):

table_columns(oid) -> SETOF trend_directory.column_info
```````````````````````````````````````````````````````
